query: Our LCP is 4.8 seconds on mobile according to PageSpeed Insights. The hero image is 2MB and loaded lazily. Help me fix the loading strategy and add preload hints
CLS is 0.35 on our blog pages because images load without width/height attributes and the web font causes a reflow. Fix both issues
INP is 450ms on our dashboard because the filter handler processes 10,000 items synchronously. Break it into chunks and yield to the main thread between batches
PageSpeed score dropped from 92 to 54 after we added a third-party chat widget. How do I lazy load it so it doesn't block LCP and inflate INP?
Set up performance budgets for our CI pipeline — max 200KB JS, 50KB CSS, 200KB largest image. Fail the build if any budget is exceeded
Our TTFB is 1.9 seconds because the TanStack Start loader does 3 sequential database queries before rendering. How do I parallelize them and add edge caching?
Lighthouse performance score fluctuates between 60-85 on repeated runs. How do I get stable measurements, and should I focus on lab data or CrUX field data?
Mobile users report our product listing page feels laggy. INP is fine on desktop but 520ms on a Moto G Power. The DOM has 3200 nodes — should I virtualize the list?
CLS is 0 in development but 0.28 in production. We have a consent banner and two ad slots that inject content without reserved space. How do I fix this?
Add fetchPriority='high' to our LCP hero image, inline the critical above-fold CSS, and convert the hero from PNG to WebP with responsive srcset
Run a full SEO audit on https://mysite.com with scoring across technical SEO, on-page, structured data, social sharing, and performance
Audit our site for WCAG 2.2 Level AA accessibility compliance — check keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and color contrast
Our API response time is 800ms for the /api/products endpoint. Optimize the Drizzle query by adding indexes and reducing N+1 queries
Reduce our Docker image size from 1.2GB to under 200MB by switching to a multi-stage build with alpine base
The React app re-renders the entire component tree when any state changes. Add React.memo and useMemo to prevent unnecessary renders on the user list
Configure nginx caching headers for static assets — set Cache-Control max-age to 1 year for hashed files and no-cache for HTML
Our TanStack Table renders 500 rows and scrolling is janky. Implement virtualization with @tanstack/react-virtual
Set up webpack bundle analyzer to visualize which dependencies contribute the most to our JavaScript bundle size
Add image optimization to our build pipeline — compress PNGs with pngquant and convert JPEGs to WebP using sharp in a postbuild script
Our Cloudflare Worker is hitting the 3MB bundle size limit. Identify the largest dependencies and lazy-load them
